title: Undo up to 100 board's activities with LogBack new version

posts.author: Dor_appSolution (Dor)
posts.cookedHtml:
We’re excited to bring you the latest version of LogBack!
In this version, we’ve enhanced the functionality to allow the selection and restoration of up to 100 activities simultaneously each time.

What’s more, we’ve implemented the option to perform multiple selections using the Shift keyboard, streamlining the process of selecting activities for restoration.

Try now using this link:

auth.monday.com

Welcome to monday.com | a new way of working

monday.com Work OS is an open platform where anyone can create the tools they need to run every aspect of their work.
